home.introBody: I'm a full-stack developer specializing in building web applications with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. In my spare time, I enjoy photography, blogging, and exploring new technologies.

me.title: About Me
me.subtitle: Get to know me, in a blink of an eye.

me.title: Who is Anthony?
me.content: A Front End Engineer with three years of experience. I have written React, Typescript, C#. I thrive on crafting interactive, responsive, and user-friendly web applications that scale seamlessly. My journey is fueled by a self-driven passion for learning programming languages and staying abreast of modern web technologies.

background.title: About my background
background.content: Rather than having an education in Computer Science, at 18 years old without knowing where my passion was, I decided to pursue a bachelor's degree in Mathematics from NYU. As a person who built my own pc and always want to customize any configurations related to personsal preferences, I realize that software engineer is exactly the place I want to be because it gives me full control over the things I want to build

blog.title: About my blog
blog.content: I will post things like blogs, thoughts, and sometimes my life anecdotes here. If you find anything interesting, please do not hestitate to share and comment.

cv.title: My CV
cv.subtitle: A brief overview of my professional experience and skills.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.subtitle: It's never hard to reach out to me, at any time.

project.title: Projects
project.subtitle: Take a look at what I have built, in the past

forgotPasswordForm.description: Type in your email and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.

successPage.title: Check Your Email
